page_metadata.biotools__summary: Cheminformatics Tool for Probabilistic Identification of Carbohydrates (CTPIC) is a tool that analyzes the covalent structure of a compound to yield a probabilistic measure for distinguishing saccharides and saccharide-derivatives from non-saccharides.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Cheminformatics Tool for Probabilistic Identification of Carbohydrates (CTPIC) is a tool that analyzes the covalent structure of a compound to yield a probabilistic measure for distinguishing saccharides and saccharide-derivatives from non-saccharides.
